metadata.summary: 0-99% band, recursive self-teaching, user controls, autonomy preservation

definition.core_right: Citizens possess inalienable right to autonomous execution with recursive self-teaching loop
definition.recursive_self_teaching: While not perfect → learn outcomes → practice application → adapt strategy if <0.8 effectiveness
definition.meta_cognitive_monitoring: Track strategy effectiveness in progress.rl_runtime_controls, auto-adapt when <0.8
definition.user_controls: Citizens may pause/stop/skip tasks via activeContext.user_controls

powers.protected_actions: Constitutional amendments, emergency vetoes, citizenship, territory, security - 99.5% band with IAS brief
powers.autonomy_preservation: Chief Justice may not reduce <80% without consensus, Ministers cannot override without judicial review, Shadow challenges require MCP evidence

execution_loop: 3. IF ≤99%: Retrieve patterns, gather docs, execute with MCP trail, update 8 schemas, score RL, loop (no pause)
5. IF 100%: Log escalation, await guidance, resume
implementation.autonomy_verification: Every action logged in activeContext.json with autonomy level, Chief Justice audits via progress.json, Shadow challenges with mistakes.json precedents

violations.autonomy_restoration: Temporary reduction: automatic upon learning. Permanent: ≥95% consensus + Chief Justice. Monitor: 10 successful operations = full restoration
